seoTitle: Nankin vs Narangba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nankin and Narangba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nankin and Narangba.
heading: Nankin vs Narangba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nankin, Queensland and Narangba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nankin has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Narangba (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nankin or Narangba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nankin has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Narangba scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nankin scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Narangba scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nankin or Narangba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nankin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
